response.justification: Bogdan Szabo is a strong web and backend engineer with 16+ years of experience, but his C++ exposure is minimal — roughly six months at National Instruments and a bachelor thesis project — far short of the deep, production-grade C++ systems work this role demands. His primary stack is TypeScript/Node.js/DLang, and there is no evidence of industrial automation, IoT protocols (MQTT, Modbus, OPC UA), IEC 62443 secure development lifecycle practices, or multi-threaded systems programming at scale. The advantageous-skill overlap (Node.js, React) is real but peripheral to the core requirements.
strengths: Demonstrated event-driven and distributed-systems thinking through GISCollective and the Sociomantic high-throughput micro-services role
Node.js and React experience aligns with the role's advantageous skill set
Long career track record of ownership, mentoring, and cross-functional collaboration across diverse domains
concerns: C++ experience is superficial — approximately six months professionally and one thesis project; the role requires 8–12 years of deep C++ systems development
No evidence of industrial automation, IoT, MQTT, Modbus, OPC UA, or any IEC 62443 / SDL security practice
Core expertise is in web/TypeScript/DLang stack with no multi-threaded low-level systems programming at the depth this role requires
